definition: to kill, slay , (Homer), etc.; of animals, to slaughter , (Homer); Οὖτις με κτείνει δόλωι seeks to kill  me (the force of the present tense), (Odyssey by Homer); ὁ κτανών the slayer, murderer , (Aeschulus Tragicus); οἱ κτανόντες (Aeschulus Tragicus):—; to put to death  by law, (Thucydides)—;In attic θνήσκω or ἀποθνήσκω is used for the Pass. (ML)
